title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 178.860 - Board to appoint employees — fix compensation — teachers to be members of public school retirement system
text:
178.860.  Board to appoint employees — fix compensation — teachers to be members of public school retirement system. — The board of trustees shall appoint the employees of the community college, define and assign their powers and duties and fix their compensation.  All certificated personnel shall be members of the public school retirement system of Missouri under provisions of section 169.010.
(L. 1963 p. 200 § 13-86) 
(Source: L. 1961 p. 357 § 10)
